2141.sentenceCn: 我喜欢在暮光时分看天空。

2142.sentence: My shadow is very long on the sunny street.

2218.sentence: We had a picnic on the green meadow behind our house.

2355.sentenceCn: 今天很冷，只有五摄氏度！

4928.sentence: Every spring, I watch migratory birds fly over our house.

4929.sentenceCn: 我们学校每周五下午都有清洁日。

4931.sentence: Today is bikeday at school, so I ride my bike with Tom.

4932.sentence: Today is walkday, so we walk to school together.
4932.sentenceCn: 今天是步行日，所以我们一起走路去上学。

4936.sentenceCn: 我们学校每年春天都会举办和平节。

4940.sentence: Our neighbors bring cookies to us on neighborsday.
